content.en:
"It's been nine wins in a row, and we're about to have our tenth challenge!"

Ye Tian muttered.

According to the rules of the primeval god realm, the tenth match of ten consecutive wins will arrange an opponent who is not weak, and once you win the opponent, you can get a ten-game winning streak.

This title is still very useful, such as getting more attention, and it can reduce the entry fee a little.

However, without a certain amount of strength, there is no way to get ten consecutive wins.

Suddenly.

The Ancient Divine Realm reminded him that his application for the tenth challenge was successful.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian entered the Ancient God Realm, and was soon teleported to the challenge field of the Ancient God Realm, and his opponent was also teleported in.

Then.

Ye Tian found that the number of spectators was finally not 0, and soon dozens of Heavenly Ancestors were watching the battle.

Obviously, these people are not looking at him, but at their opponents.

"Purple Sea Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian could see from his record that the opponent's strength was very good, and seventy percent was a winning record.

"9-0!"

When the Purple Sea Heavenly Ancestor saw Ye Tian's achievements, he immediately became solemn.

This means that Ye Tian's strength is very strong, and he may not be able to win.

At this time, more and more Heavenly Ancestors poured in to watch the battle, and these Heavenly Ancestors intertwined and communicated with each other in the void.

"Zihai Heavenly Ancestor is here to challenge again, who is on the other side, it's very unfamiliar!"

"I just checked this Heavenly Ancestor's record, 9-0, this is his 10-game winning streak challenge!"

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, I haven't heard of it, but if I can win nine consecutive victories, my strength must be good!, however, the strength of the Purple Sea Heavenly Ancestor is very strong!"

"The Purple Sea Heavenly Ancestor is the top six-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, even in the Ancient God Realm, his combat power is already very strong, I think he still has a lot of hope in this game!"

Soon, the battle began.

Ye Tian didn't expose the Ancient Technique, he only thought that the Extreme Technique was fighting.

Even if he didn't use the Ancient Technique, he was also a boundary-breaking genius, so when his body was strong, only a boundary-breaking genius could fight him.

Rumble!!!!

The Extreme Technique erupted, shattering the body of the Purple Sea Heavenly Ancestor with one blow, and although the other party did not die, his body was cracked, and he couldn't withstand a few moves at all.

"Boundary-breaking genius!"

Zihai Heavenly Ancestor was stunned, he was so unlucky, he met a boundary-breaking genius, and he also became a witness to the opponent's ten consecutive victories!

Swish!

Ye Tian attacked again, and it was the Extreme Technique that broke out again.

The Purple Sea Heavenly Ancestor used a defensive immeasurable magic technique, but he still couldn't bear it, and he was beaten through his body again, and he didn't even have time to heal and recover.

Then, another trick struck.

This time, the Purple Sea Heavenly Ancestor was directly killed.

"The Purple Sea Heavenly Ancestor has been defeated, and the other party turned out to be a boundary-breaking genius!"

"Where did you come from, why haven't you heard of it!"

"Boundary-breaking genius, as long as you're not too unlucky, you can almost complete a thousand consecutive victories!"

"Hurry up and spread the news, a new boundary-breaking genius has entered the primeval god realm, and it is estimated that you will soon be able to see the confrontation between the boundary-breaking geniuses!"

Soon.

When the news spread, many people were waiting for Ye Tian's next challenge.

After completing ten consecutive victories, Ye Tian returned to the personal space of the Ancient God Realm.

At this time, he has one more title on his record data - ten consecutive wins!

Moreover, he also received a share of the spectators this time.

"2570 points!"

This point is not high, and when converted into Taikoo Gold, it is only more than two Taikoo Gold.

However, this is a game of earning!

In this way, every challenge has such a benefit, and if you have been fighting in the Ancient God Realm, you can get a huge amount of Ancient Gold, which is faster than going out to find resources!

Of course.

If you participate in the challenge too much, no one will want to watch it in the later stage, especially if you kill the enemy in seconds every time and are invincible in the primeval god realm, then it will be boring.

"Hey, Heavenly Ancestor is paying attention to me!"

He could see how many Heavenly Ancestors were paying attention to him.

This kind of attention can allow the Celestial Ancestors to know each other's dynamics more quickly, for example, if the Celestial Ancestor who is followed participates in the challenge, the other Celestial Ancestors will quickly receive the message, and thus enter the Ancient God Realm to watch the battle.

This is somewhat similar to the live broadcast on Earth, the incomparably distant memory seems to have returned, this feeling is all too familiar.

Soon, more and more Heavenly Ancestors paid attention to him.

"It should be the news of a boundary-breaking genius, so many Heavenly Ancestors have paid attention to me!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Subsequently, he went on to apply for the challenge.

Naturally, it is not worth mentioning that he has won ten consecutive victories, and he still has to challenge a hundred consecutive victories and a thousand consecutive victories!

Soon, Ye Tian conducted his eleventh challenge.

This time, there were quite a few Heavenly Ancestors watching the battle.

And the opponent of the eleventh challenge was very weak, and he was directly killed by Ye Tian in one move.

"The Boundary-Breaking Genius is too powerful, I don't have any interest in watching such a challenge, and when he wins a hundred in a row, I'll come and watch the battle again!" said a Heavenly Ancestor.

After all, there is a fee to watch the battle, and there is no need to watch this kind of boring battle.

However, there are still Heavenly Ancestors who are rich and don't care about this cost.

Therefore, there are still many Heavenly Ancestors who watch every challenge of Ye Tian.

As time passed, Ye Tian's winning streak grew.

Twenty wins in a row!

Thirty wins in a row!

Forty wins in a row!

......

After a long time, Ye Tian finally ushered in his hundredth challenge.

"Apply for the challenge!"

This time, he had waited a little longer, and the Heavenly Ancestor who was paying more attention to him had also been.

It is conceivable that in the hundredth game, the number of Heavenly Ancestors who will pay attention to it will definitely be a lot, beyond his imagination.

After a long time, the application for the challenge was successful, and the primeval god realm arranged an opponent for him.

The primeval realm.

Challenge the space.

Ye Tian came in, and another Heavenly Ancestor also came in.

At this time, the number of Heavenly Ancestors watching the battle soared at an incredible speed.

Lakh!

Two hundred thousand!

300,000!

In a few moments, it was more than half a million.

"There are so many Heavenly Ancestors in the Ancient God Realm!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

However, when I thought of many top Blood Transformation Realm races, there were tens of thousands or even hundreds of thousands of clansmen at every turn, and every clansman was a Blood Transformation Realm, so it was normal for cultivators to have so many Blood Transformation Realms.

It can only be said that Wanlong's territorial waters are too weak, so he feels that this number is exaggerated.

"The Boundary-Breaking Genius Endless Heavenly Ancestor's 100-Win Streak Challenge has begun!"

"The other party is the Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor,, this is the Seven Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor!"

"What about the Seven Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, here the physical strength is the same, the immeasurable will is the same, not a boundary-breaking level genius, you can only look at your own means. The Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor still can't beat the boundary-breaking genius in the Ancient God Realm, so it's doomed!"

"To be able to see the battle of a Boundary-Breaking Genius Domain Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor is worth the cost!"

"Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor is good at speed, he should be able to hold on for a while and not be killed in seconds!"

Under the watchful eyes of many Heavenly Ancestors, Ye Tian fought with the Lone Star Heavenly Ancestor.
